queries.question: Show all the restaurants and bars which open from 9AM to 11PM.
queries.sql:
SELECT Restaurant.name
FROM Restaurant
WHERE Restaurant.openingHours = "9 AM to 11 PM"
UNION
SELECT Bar.name
FROM Bar
WHERE Bar.openingHours = "9 AM to 11 PM"
